query:
SELECT 'febraban' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM febraban WHERE empresa LIKE '%Test%' OR chaveJ LIKE '%KEY177%' OR nomeAgente LIKE '%Unique Agent%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'certificacoes' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM certificacoes WHERE empresa LIKE '%Test%' OR chaveJ LIKE '%KEY177%' OR nomeAgente LIKE '%Unique Agent%'
